MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL'S Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

The unopposed Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.
